action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 26, the orbit escape maneuver got stuck in an infinite loop of reversing direction. Analysis: The stuck detection (`dist_moved < 0.08`) was triggering even when Spot was just turning in place (`lin_vel = 0.0`), because its base position wasn't changing. This caused it to constantly reverse its escape direction before it could even start moving. Decision: I will fix the stuck detection to only trigger if Spot is actually trying to move linearly (`abs(last_lin_vel) > 0.1`). This ensures it only detects being stuck against a wall, not just turning in place. I will update predict.py and test_follower.py, run test_follower.py to verify the fix, and submit eval.
